mechanics.name: Power-up
mechanics.summary: One-shot activated ability granting +1/+1 counters (plus riders); costs the card's mana cost less if activated the turn it entered.

mechanics.name: Teamwork
mechanics.summary: Optional additional cost on instants/sorceries: tap creatures with total power N for an upgraded effect.

mechanics.name: Connive
mechanics.summary: Draw a card, then discard a card; if you discarded a nonland card, put a +1/+1 counter on the creature.

mechanics.name: Plan
mechanics.summary: Enchantment subtype: repeatable trigger adds plan counters; the Nth counter sacrifices it for a large one-shot payoff.

mechanics.name: Hero/Villain typal
mechanics.summary: Hero is W-centered (allies G/U), Villain is B-centered (allies R/U); ~50 cards reference one of the two types.

archetypes.name: Teamwork tempo
archetypes.playstyle: Best-cards tempo: fliers and cheap Equipment with tap synergies — Teamwork spells and Vehicles convert a wide board into free value.

archetypes.name: Lone-attacker Equipment
archetypes.playstyle: Suit up one evasive attacker and swing alone for cumulative bonuses and drain; Equipment density is the real engine.

archetypes.name: Teamwork spells aggro
archetypes.playstyle: Low-curve attackers plus a dense suite of tricks and Teamwork removal; prowess-style payoffs reward casting noncreature spells mid-combat.

archetypes.name: Heroes midrange
archetypes.playstyle: Hero-typal ETB payoffs stacked on big bodies — the data says go tall with fat creatures and pump, not wide with tokens.

archetypes.name: Connive draw-two grind
archetypes.playstyle: Black-heavy Villain attrition: connive and cheap draw trigger second-draw payoffs while the graveyard fuels recursion.

archetypes.name: Artifacts matter
archetypes.playstyle: The format's one true build-around: artifact density feeds count- and ETB-payoffs; commit fully or stay out.

archetypes.name: +1/+1 counters
archetypes.playstyle: Every counter source compounds: power-up, connive and draw triggers grow the board while token- and hexproof-payoffs cash them in.

archetypes.name: Villain token aggro
archetypes.playstyle: Swarm with menace Villain tokens and typal ETB triggers, greasing the wheels with sacrifice and discard; needs a critical mass of Villains.

archetypes.name: Graveyard sacrifice
archetypes.playstyle: Fill the yard with two-plus creature cards to switch on cheap threshold payoffs; recursion turns every trade into value. Wants 16+ creatures.

archetypes.name: Power-up stompy
archetypes.playstyle: Oversized bodies with one-shot Power-up abilities, backed by burn and rummage; the data favors the spell-velocity half over pure ramp.
